title: Virginia Advances in ACC Tourney with Win Over NC State
summary: No. 10 Virginia defeated NC State 81-74 for the third time this season in the ACC Tournament. Malik Thomas scored 16 points.
charlotte_impact: Virginia's victory impacts their tournament standing and reflects their consistent performance against a conference rival.

title: Virginia Secures ACC Tournament Win Against NC State
summary: Virginia defeated N.C. State 81- in the ACC Tournament, led by Malik Thomas with 16 points and Thijs De Ridder with 15.
charlotte_impact: The win advances Virginia in the ACC Tournament, highlighting their competitive performance this season.

title: Virginia and NC State Face Off in ACC Tournament
summary: Virginia plays NC State in a quarterfinal round matchup at the 2026 ACC Tournament in Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: This game is a key matchup in the ACC Tournament, influencing both teams' chances for advancement.

title: NC State vs. Virginia: ACC Tournament Preview
summary: NC State Wolfpack meet the No. 11 Virginia Cavaliers in an ACC Tournament quarterfinal in Charlotte, North Carolina.
charlotte_impact: The game is a significant event in the ACC Tournament, drawing attention from sports fans and analysts.

title: I-77 Shut Down in Mooresville Due to Crash
summary: Northbound I-77 is closed near Exit 35 in Mooresville due to a crash, causing traffic delays.
charlotte_impact: The closure impacts commuters and travelers, causing significant disruptions and potential safety concerns.

title: Severe Weather Common in Carolinas During Spring
summary: March brings an active storm season to the Carolinas due to warm Gulf air mixing with lingering winter cold.
charlotte_impact: Residents need to be prepared for severe weather conditions, including potential storms and related hazards.

title: Homicide Investigation Underway in West Charlotte
summary: A homicide investigation is underway after a body was found off Belmeade Drive and Mount Holly Road in west Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: The investigation raises concerns about community safety and requires police resources to resolve.

title: Cold Temperatures Expected with Sunny Skies
summary: Cold temperatures and sunny skies are forecasted, with freeze warnings each night through Thursday morning.
charlotte_impact: Residents should take precautions to protect plants and ensure personal safety during the cold weather.

title: Water Gun Incident Triggers Lockdown at South Iredell High
summary: A water gun mistaken for a pistol caused a lockdown at South Iredell High School due to a "Senior Assassin" game.
charlotte_impact: The incident highlights the need for awareness and caution regarding school safety and student activities.

title: Gaston County Man Wins $100,000 Lottery
summary: David Abernathy won $100,000 on a Cash Payday lottery ticket purchased at Main Street Market in Stanley.
charlotte_impact: The lottery win brings positive news to the community and highlights the potential for financial gain.

title: Storm Cleanup: Official Warnings on Hidden Dangers
summary: Emergency crews warn of injuries occurring during storm cleanup, emphasizing the need for caution.

title: Charlotte Leaders Seek Input on Next Year's Budget
summary: Charlotte leaders are starting the planning process for the city’s fiscal year 2027 budget, beginning with a Budget 101 session.
charlotte_impact: Citizen input is crucial for shaping the city's budget and addressing community needs effectively.

title: Police Investigate Girl's Death at Mental Health Facility
summary: Police are investigating the death of a girl at Cornerstone Treatment Facility in Anson County.

title: Protests Over Silfab Solar Plant in York County
summary: Protesters want York County to revoke Silfab Solar's certificate after chemical incidents, questioning zoning compliance.

title: Teen Charged with Killing Mother's Boyfriend in Lancaster County
summary: A Lancaster County teen is charged with killing his mother's boyfriend during an argument that escalated to a shooting.
charlotte_impact: The incident highlights the tragic consequences of domestic disputes and the impact on families.
